posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Team!

Exciting news! we have rolling out Daily Status Mail System to keep everyone in the loop and ensure smooth communication across departments. Here’s how it works:

Submission Process:

  1)Employees will submit their daily status updates through the Monday form. 📝
  2)This information will automatically generate an item on our Monday board. 📌

Notification to HR:

   1) Once the item is created, a notification will be sent to our HR team via Teams. 💬
   2)This ensures that HR stays informed and can address any concerns promptly. 👩‍💼👨‍💼

Mail to Team Leaders:

    1)Simultaneously, an email will be dispatched to the respective team leaders. 📧
    2)Team leaders will have a clear overview of their team's progress and can provide necessary guidance. 🚀

This system aims to enhance transparency, improve communication, and foster collaboration among teams. Let’s embrace this change together and make our workflow even more efficient!
